title: Nohkalikai Falls
tagline: Nohkalikai Falls — heritage city of Meghalaya

overview.short: Nohkalikai Falls, sometimes Ka Likai, is the tallest plunge waterfall in India.
overview.description: Nohkalikai Falls, sometimes Ka Likai, is the tallest plunge waterfall in India. The 340 metres (1,115 ft) waterfall is located in the Indian state of Meghalaya, near Cherapunji (now known as Sohra), one of the wettest places on Earth. Nohkalikai Falls are fed by the rainwater collected on the summit of a comparatively small plateau and decrease in power during the dry season, from December to February. Below the falls is a plunge pool with water of an unusual shade of green.

topPlaces.name: Wei Sawdong Falls
topPlaces.description: Wei Sawdong Falls is a three-tiered waterfall located in Cherrapunji, Meghalaya.

topPlaces.name: Umshiang Double-Decker Root Bridge
topPlaces.description: Umshiang Double-Decker Root Bridge is a living root bridge in Meghalaya, India. It can be reached via trekking 45 kilometres (28 mi), or 6500 steps, from Cherrapunji.

topPlaces.name: Cherrapunji
topPlaces.description: Cherrapunji ( ), also known as Sohra, is a sub-divisional town (Proposed District) in the East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. It was the traditional capital of ka hima Sohra (Khasi tribal kingdom).

topPlaces.name: Wah Kaba Falls
topPlaces.description: Wah Kaba Falls is a waterfall located near Cherrapunji in Meghalaya, in the north eastern India. The waterfall descends from a steep rockface and drops approximately 170–190 metres into a gorge.

topPlaces.name: Kynrem Falls
topPlaces.description: The Kynrem Falls is located 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Cherrapunji in East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. It is situated inside the Thangkharang Park.

topPlaces.name: Nohsngithiang Falls
topPlaces.description: Nohsngithiang Falls (also known as the Seven Sisters Waterfalls or Mawsmai Falls) is a seven-segmented waterfall located 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) south of Mawsmai village in East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. The water falls from a height of 315 metres (1,033 ft) and has an average width of 70 metres (230 ft).

items.note: Wei Sawdong Falls is a three-tiered waterfall located in Cherrapunji, Meghalaya.
Umshiang Double-Decker Root Bridge is a living root bridge in Meghalaya, India. It can be reached via trekking 45 kilometres (28 mi), or 6500 steps, from Cherrapunji.

Cherrapunji ( ), also known as Sohra, is a sub-divisional town (Proposed District) in the East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. It was the traditional capital of ka hima Sohra (Khasi tribal kingdom).
Wah Kaba Falls is a waterfall located near Cherrapunji in Meghalaya, in the north eastern India. The waterfall descends from a steep rockface and drops approximately 170–190 metres into a gorge.
The Kynrem Falls is located 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Cherrapunji in East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. It is situated inside the Thangkharang Park.

Nohsngithiang Falls (also known as the Seven Sisters Waterfalls or Mawsmai Falls) is a seven-segmented waterfall located 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) south of Mawsmai village in East Khasi Hills district in the Indian state of Meghalaya. The water falls from a height of 315 metres (1,033 ft) and has an average width of 70 metres (230 ft).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nohkalikai Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nohkalikai Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nohkalikai Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shillong Airport (Umroi) (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nohkalikai Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nohkalikai Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nohkalikai Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Nohkalikai Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nohkalikai Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Wei Sawdong Falls, Umshiang Double-Decker Root Bridge, Cherrapunji, Wah Kaba Falls, Kynrem Falls.
